title: Measuring Cups, Ceramic, Standard Measurements, Set of 4
description:
About this item
STANDARD MEASUREMENTS: The set includes 1/4 cup, 1/3 cup, 1/2 cup and 1 cup measures.
EASY TO HOLD: The cups are a pleasing shape which means they are easy to hold.
SIMPLE TO READ: The engraved markings make measuring ingredients easy.
DURABLE: The cups are made of ceramic and are made to last through many baking and cooking adventures.
EASY TO CLEAN: Urban Cupboard Measuring Cups are dishwasher safe.
